evidence_quotes.quote: reducing the addictive design that has flooded today’s market

paragraphs.text: First, I would like to say that I am in favour of this initiative. As a consumer, the fairness of digital products on the market is very interesting and I want to support everything I try to solve issues that may arise in this area. I am particularly positive in reducing the addictive design that has flooded today’s market. However, I would like to add an additional issue that has emerged recently, relating to the destruction of video games. Many games produced now have a purely digital form like online services and this allows the person offering the service to interrupt it in a short period of time, without notice to the people who have paid for it and without a plan for what will be done with the product they bought in the future. There is already another initiative to be completed shortly entitled – End the destruction of video games – and which is strongly supported by consumers and professionals. This does not go far beyond the objectives of this initiative and I would be happy if the above topic or a similar concept could be put into the spotlight. Thank you in advance.
